test_cases.description: Newsletter swap between investigative journalism and finance newsletters

input.my_account: PAPER TRAIL — investigative financial crime newsletter/podcast, 14,000 subscribers
input.target: CAPITAL NOTES — financial regulation newsletter, 22,000 subscribers
input.proposal: Newsletter swap — one-issue feature in each other's newsletter
input.compatibility: Both cover financial system failures from different angles
input.connection: Quoted their coverage twice, no prior contact

test_cases.notes: Opening references specific recent piece — not generic praise. Audience compatibility is concrete. Proposal is named (newsletter swap) with explicit terms. Ask is specific and low-friction. Peer-to-peer tone maintained throughout.

test_cases.description: Podcast guest swap between two documentary podcasts

input.my_account: FIELD NOTES — documentary making podcast, 8,000 listeners per episode
input.target: THE LONG FRAME — film criticism podcast focusing on documentary, 15,000 listeners
input.proposal: Guest swap — I appear on their show, their host appears on mine
input.compatibility: Documentary production and documentary criticism are complementary angles on the same world
input.connection: Met briefly at a screening event

test_cases.notes: In-person connection reference personalises the pitch appropriately without overstating the relationship. Guest swap format clearly explained. Tone correctly peer-to-peer despite follower size difference.

test_cases.description: Instagram story takeover between two photographers

input.my_account: Documentary photographer, 4,200 Instagram followers, urban industrial photography
input.target: Photography magazine Instagram account, 45,000 followers, covers documentary and street photography
input.proposal: Instagram story takeover — I take over their stories for one day during my current project
input.compatibility: Their audience interested in documentary photography, my work fits their editorial coverage

test_cases.notes: Size asymmetry handled correctly — pitch offers specific value (access/story) rather than simple audience swap. Takeover format proposal includes content preview. Limitation about size gap acknowledged.
